messages.content:

definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

message.content: This section serves as a title/header for a report segment focused on 2025 global mobile game marketing trends, specifically targeting marketing insights for popular mobile game advertisers. It can answer high-level contextual questions regarding the document's primary topic (global mobile game marketing), relevant entities (mobile game advertisers, global gaming market), and timeframe (2025). The provided excerpt contains no substantive definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed analytical, procedural, or data-driven questions. Retrieval queries should target this section only for thematic identification, document navigation, or metadata context related to 2025 mobile game advertising trends.
